layout_and_spacing.dashboard_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 md:gap-6
layout_and_spacing.card_style: border border-zinc-200 bg-white hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] transition-all duration-300

components.sidebar: w-64 border-r border-zinc-200 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 h-screen
components.header: h-16 border-b border-zinc-200 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 sticky top-0 z-50 flex items-center px-6
components.button: bg-zinc-950 text-white hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors font-medium rounded-none px-6 py-2 flex items-center gap-2
components.kpi_card: p-6 border border-zinc-200 bg-white flex flex-col gap-2 relative overflow-hidden group hover:border-zinc-300
components.charts: recharts customized with flat colors, 1px stroke for grid lines (#E4E4E7), and no rounded corners on bars
components.table: w-full text-sm text-left. Header: bg-zinc-50 border-y border-zinc-200 text-zinc-500 uppercase tracking-wider font-medium text-xs py-3 px-4. Cells: border-b border-zinc-100 py-3 px-4
components.file_upload: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-200 bg-zinc-50 hover:border-zinc-400 hover:bg-zinc-100 transition-colors p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center gap-4 cursor-pointer

accessibility.contrast_ratio: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 for all text. Use dark zinc (#09090B) for primary readability.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all interactive and key data elements (e.g. data-testid='kpi-budget-card', data-testid='upload-submit-btn')

landing_hero.description: Clean, minimalist white modern architecture. Use as the background for the Landing page with a white glassmorphism overlay.

abstract_background.description: Abstract white interior. Perfect for creating a calm, high-end feel in the file upload area or report generation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: recharts, lucide-react, clsx, tailwind-merge.
In your HTML/React code, MUST include standard <link> tags to load 'Cabinet Grotesk' (from Fontshare) and 'IBM Plex Sans' (from Google Fonts).
Build the ZALR Cost Dashboard with an authoritative, data-dense F-pattern layout. Filter sidebar on the left, primary KPIs at the top, followed by interactive charts.
Apply 'Swiss & High-Contrast' principles: use strict lines, no gradient backgrounds, mostly monochrome (zinc-50 to zinc-950) with high-contrast data accent colors.
Implement the Excel Drag & Drop Upload section clearly with dashed borders and hover states.
Add 'data-testid' to EVERY button, input, navigation link, and chart container for testing.
For Shadcn components, override defaults to remove excessive rounding (use rounded-sm or rounded-none) and remove shadows. Rely on 1px borders instead.
Render all 8 modules/charts (KPI row, Grouped Bar, Donut, Line, Pie, Stacked Bar, Gauge, and Summary Table) as distinct grid items with p-6.
